title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.308 - School Counseling Week designated for first full week in February
text:
9.308.  School Counseling Week designated for first full week in February. — The first full week in February is hereby designated as "School Counseling Week" in the state of Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities that recognize the important work of school counselors in helping Missouri's students succeed in school and beyond.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
